arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

data.reasoningText: The user wants to run only the tests with the `Category=Integration` trait in their xUnit project. Let me first look at the project files to understand the setup.

arguments.description: Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait

toolCalls.name: bash
toolCalls.args: {"command": "cd /tmp/sv-de42ba8b9c55444bb02a39cffb652edb && dotnet test --filter \"Category=Integration\" --no-restore 2>&1 | head -40", "description": "Run xUnit tests filtered by Category=Integration trait", "initial_wait": 30}

data.content:
All 5 integration tests passed. The command is:

```
dotnet test --filter "Category=Integration"
```

This uses the `--filter` flag to select only tests decorated with `[Trait("Category", "Integration")]`.
